title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates:
Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates!
